# Pull Request

## Change Type

Select all that apply:

- [ ] New lab
- [ ] Prototype update
- [ ] Accelerator update
- [ ] Deployment pattern
- [ ] Security control pattern
- [ ] Compliance evidence model
- [ ] AI workflow pattern
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Repository maintenance

## Summary

Describe the change and the engineering problem it addresses.

## Boundary Statement

State what this change does and does not do.

## Validation Performed

List commands, checks, reviews, or tests performed.

- [ ] `./scripts/validate-lab.sh`
- [ ] `./scripts/check-boundaries.sh`
- [ ] `./scripts/generate-evidence.sh`
- [ ] Other:

## Evidence Generated

List evidence files, logs, screenshots, workflow outputs, or review artifacts.

## Security Impact

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No production credentials used
- [ ] No production deployment authority added
- [ ] Workflow permissions reviewed
- [ ] AI output remains advisory and human-reviewed, if applicable

## Compliance Impact

Describe any control mapping, evidence impact, audit trail impact, or policy exception.

## Known Limitations

List any limitations, assumptions, or follow-up work.
